## What

<!-- One sentence. What does this PR do? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in browser (dark + light mode)
- [ ] No new inline `<svg>` tags (use icon components)
- [ ] Existing tests pass (`npm run check`)

### If adding an icon:
- [ ] Uses `IconBase` component
- [ ] viewBox 16×16, stroke 1.5, round linecap/linejoin
- [ ] Shape-based name (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Added to `index.ts` barrel export
- [ ] Visible at `/icons` catalog
